meetings.name: Regular board meeting
meetings.description:
The regular board meeting provides a public forum for the board of directors to conduct official business, review reports from district leadership, and approve key resolutions. Community members are invited to attend and participate in the public comment period.

This recurring meeting covers standing agenda items including the superintendent's report, consent agenda, policy updates, and any action items brought forward by board committees.

meetings.name: Finance Committee — Annual Budget Review and Long-Term Capital Planning Session
meetings.description:
The finance committee meeting brings together committee members and district finance staff to review the district's financial position, monitor budget performance, and provide oversight of major expenditures. Discussions are based on current financial reports and variance analysis prepared by the finance department.

This meeting is a working session for committee members and relevant staff. Action items and recommendations from this meeting are reported to the full board for approval.

meetings.name: Audit & Risk Review: Internal Controls, Compliance Frameworks, and Emerging Risk Factors
meetings.description:
The audit and risk committee meets to oversee the district's internal audit program, review findings from internal and external auditors, and monitor the status of the risk register. The committee ensures that controls are operating effectively and that significant risks are being actively managed.

This meeting includes updates from the internal audit team, discussion of any emerging compliance issues, and follow-up on outstanding audit recommendations from prior periods.

templates.name: Special session
templates.description:
A special session is convened to address urgent or time-sensitive matters that cannot wait for the next regularly scheduled board meeting. The agenda is focused and limited to the specific items for which the session was called.

Notice of a special session is provided in accordance with district policy and open meeting requirements. Only items listed in the meeting notice may be acted upon during a special session.
